title: hibbertia fruticosa
intro: Hibbertia fruticosa, also known as Guinea flower, is a native Australian plant that belongs to the family Dilleniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its leaves and flowers possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The Guinea flower is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
